title: Circulon Scratch Defense Stainless Steel Saucepan with Extreme Non Stick: 20cm Saucepan with Lid, Induction and All Hob Suitable
features: EXTREME NON STICK, THAT WONT SCRATCH EVER: Combining the luxury of Stainless Steel with Circulon’s ScratchDefense Extreme Non-Stick technology. A triple layer metal-utensil-safe non stick that lasts 130x longer than the competition, laboratory tests have simulated 200+ years of daily wear and tear

ULTRA-THICK CLAD INDUCTION SUITABLE COOKWARE: Multi-layer stainless steel saucepan featuring an ultra thick aluminium core that conducts heat evenly and efficiently throughout the pan, with a beautifully crafted stainless steel clad exterior from the base to the rim. Suitable for every hob every hob - Induction, Gas, Electric & Ceramic

LIFETIME GUARANTEE: Featuring fully coated flared rims and helper handle for easy pouring and added durability, this latest Circulon induction saucepan is designed to stand the test of time. Metal utensil safe and withstands more than 350,000 scrapes without scratching, peeling, or flaking. Scratch free, worry free, forever

CRAFTED WITH DURABLE AEROSPACE-GRADE MATERIALS: This ScratchDefense non stick saucepan is oven-safe up to 260°C,with stainless steel handles which stay cool on the stovetop for easy handling. Glass lids oven safe up to 180°C

EASY CLEANING: Experience the very best in cooking convenience with ScratchDefense Multi-Layer stainless steel cookware and say goodbye to arduous scrubbing and soaking thanks to this easy hand wash in seconds, extreme non stick - saving valuable space in the dishwasher after a family meal!

specifications_table.Specific uses: ‎Sautéing, Simmering, Searing, Cooking Sauces, Soups, Stews
